reviews.review_title: RUBBISH I WOULD HAVE GAVE 0 STARS
reviews.review_description: I’ve tried to contact meta for a digital refund but never got the code to solve it I’m furious.this game is totally UNPLAYABLE SO MANY BUGS IN IT PLEASE SORT THIS OUT I PAID GOOD MONEY FOR THIS AND ITS UNPLAYABLE. u can’t shoot correctly you can’t move without jumping all over the place and screen it’s unbelievable please contact me to get my refund as I’ve tried so many times to do this.and it’s impossible I’m also furious with meta because of the refund policy pls either give me a refund or a different game from your library

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear you experienced issues. Our team has thoroughly tested the game across multiple devices and the gameplay mechanics are functioning as intended. Many reported bugs are usually caused by device settings, outdated software, or connection issues.

We recommend ensuring your device and the Meta platform are fully updated. If problems persist, please reach out to Meta Support for assistance with refunds—they handle digital purchases directly.

We appreciate all feedback and are continuously working to improve the experience for everyone.

Thank you,
